channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Lufthansa to Cut 20,000 Flights Due to Rising Fuel Costs
item.description: Lufthansa, one of the world's largest airlines, has announced a significant reduction in its flight schedule, cutting 20,000 flights amid rising jet fuel costs. The cuts are being implemented as part ...

item.title: Brentford held by Fulham as European hopes suffer setback
item.description: Brentford miss big opportunity to climb to sixth position in the Premier League after dem play goalless draw against Fulham for Gtech Community Stadium. The match no really get plenty clear chances, a...

item.title: WhatsApp tests paid ‘Plus’ subscription with customization and premium features
item.description: WhatsApp is preparing to introduce a paid subscription tier called ‘WhatsApp Plus,’ signaling Meta’s broader strategy to diversify revenue through premium services across its platforms. The feature ha...

item.title: Chelsea suffer fifth straight EPL defeat, remain goal-shy
item.description: Chelsea dem never sabi play well for their recent EPL matches as dem lose again for Brighton stadium, 3-0. The Seagulls no even dey struggle, as Chelsea fail to create proper chances for first 30 minu...

item.title: Teenage boy charged with murdering stepsister aboard cruise ship pleads not guilty
item.description: A 16-year-old boy from Titusville, Florida, has pleaded not guilty to the alleged murder of his 18-year-old stepsister, Anna Kepner, during a family cruise in November. Federal prosecutors have charge...

item.title: Pakistan lauds ceasefire extension as hopes rise for Iran-US peace talks in Islamabad
item.description: Pakistan has officially welcomed the extension of the ceasefire between Iran and the United States, expressing optimism that ongoing diplomatic efforts in Islamabad will pave the way for a broader pea...

item.title: Eli Lilly Acquires Kelonia Therapeutics for $3.25 Billion After Rocky Road to Success
item.description: Eli Lilly has announced the acquisition of Kelonia Therapeutics, a small biotech company, for $3.25 billion. The deal highlights the company’s potential in developing cell therapies for cancer and aut...

item.title: Experts criticize flawed study linking healthy diets to lung cancer risk
item.description: A recent conference abstract presented at the American Association for Cancer Research sparked misleading headlines by suggesting that diets rich in fruits, vegetables, and whole grains may increase l...

item.title: Airfare increases driven by Middle East conflict, fuel costs and disrupted routes
item.description: Air fares have risen sharply, with the cheapest economy tickets now costing around 24% more than a year ago, according to research by consultancy Teneo. The increase is largely linked to the ongoing c...

item.title: Mbappe and Vinicius Lead Real Madrid to 2-1 Win Over Alaves
item.description: Kylian Mbappe's first league goal since February helped Real Madrid secure a 2-1 victory over Alaves on Tuesday. The French forward's shot, which deflected off a defender, opened the scoring in the 30...

item.title: Concerns Raised Over Strip Searches of Children by Police
item.description: Reports have emerged highlighting deeply concerning instances of children being subjected to strip searches by police in the UK. These searches have been described as intrusive and traumatic, raising ...

item.title: Virginia Approves New Congressional Map Favoring Democrats in Ongoing Redistricting Battles
item.description: Virginia voters approved a Democratic-backed redistricting plan in an April 2026 vote, marking a significant development in the ongoing national battle over congressional maps. The newly adopted map i...

item.title: Adam Thomas remains in 'I'm A Celebrity' camp following Jimmy Bullard's trial forfeit
item.description: During a recent episode of 'I'm A Celebrity', tensions rose when Jimmy Bullard opted to forfeit a challenge, intending to leave the show, which would have also forced his partner, Adam Thomas, out of ...

item.title: Coventry City Clinches Championship Title, Leicester City Faces Relegation
item.description: Na serious drama dey happen for di English Championship league! Coventry City, wey don dey struggle to return to di Premier League for 25 years, finally don do am! Dem win di Championship title after ...

item.title: Pope Leo calls for stronger global responsibility and peace during Africa visit
item.description: Pope Leo has raised serious concern about the direction the world is taking, warning that humanity’s future could be badly affected if global leaders do not change how they handle conflicts and intern...

item.title: LTO cancels driver’s license of female vlogger over safety violations
item.description: The Land Transportation Office (LTO) has officially revoked the driver’s license of female vlogger Ishi Lee, who gained attention online for driving while holding a recording device. The decision foll...

item.title: Lancaster man sentenced to 14 years for delivering fentanyl via drone that caused a death
item.description: Christopher 'Crany' Laney, 37, pleaded guilty to supplying fentanyl using an unregistered drone, which led to the death of a woman identified only as J.K. in January 2023. Laney operated the drone fro...

item.title: Trump endorses Sticker Mule CEO Anthony Constantino in race to replace Elise Stefanik
item.description: President Donald Trump has endorsed Anthony Constantino, the CEO of the sticker company Sticker Mule, in the Republican primary to replace Rep. Elise Stefanik in New York's 21st Congressional District...

item.title: Over 40% of Capetonians at Risk Due to High Air Pollution Levels, Study Finds
item.description: A new study from the University of Cape Town (UCT) has highlighted the severe air pollution risks facing the city. Using satellite data, researchers found that over 40% of Cape Town's population is ex...

item.title: US extends Iran ceasefire amid stalled talks and ongoing Strait of Hormuz tensions
item.description: The United States has extended its ceasefire with Iran just hours before it was due to expire, signalling a temporary pause in escalating hostilities despite continued diplomatic deadlock. President D...
